residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 266-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: Conserved B1 metallo-beta-lactamase active-site and zinc-binding motif mapping onto the ProteinGym VIM-2 target sequence.
evidence: UniProt accession A4GRB6 is inactive/deleted, so this first VIM-2 benchmark uses transparent motif-based curation rather than UniProt feature annotations. The residues mark the conserved metal-binding/catalytic-site environment used to define the exact active-site slice for the first VIM-2 run.
